definition.summary: Restore missing replicas of a volume so live count matches the replication string.
definition.description: Detects under-replicated volumes (e.g. after a node failure) and copies replicas to healthy nodes obeying rack-aware placement. Critical for durability — preferred over manual replica copy.

params.name: volume_id
params.doc: Specific volume; omit to scan whole cluster

preconditions.doc: At least one healthy node has free capacity
Probe `weed shell` admin lock with 15s timeout — fails fast if a stale session is holding it instead of letting the long-running step block
